headline: Did the Rise in This Beaten-Down SaaS Stock Just Signal the Bottom?
summary: Workday shares rose after the company posted solid revenue growth.

headline: Can Workday's New Sana AI Solutions for Enterprises Boost Its Shares?
summary: WDAY rolls out Sana for ITSM and a new Travel Agent, adding AI agents that automate IT support and travel-to-expense workflows in a single platform.

raw.headline: Can Workday's New Sana AI Solutions for Enterprises Boost Its Shares?

headline: The Groove Grows their Workday Marketplace Apps Portfolio through the Built on Workday Partner Program
summary: Groove Global LLC (The Groove), a leading Workday Services and Innovation partner, continues to expand its Marketplace Apps portfolio. These Workday native solutions are designed to help organizations reduce complexity, strengthen governance, and accelerate outcomes across critical operational and compliance use cases.

headline: Stocks Set to Open Higher as U.S.-Iran Peace Hopes Hold, PCE Inflation Data and Fed Speak Awaited
summary: June S&P 500 E-Mini futures (ESM26) are up +0.67%, and June Nasdaq 100 E-Mini futures (NQM26) are up +1.03% this morning as investors remained hopeful that the latest U.S. strikes on Iran would not derail talks to end the Middle East conflict.

headline: Dropbox CEO Drew Houston to step down after 19 years at helm of cloud storage pioneer
summary: Dropbox CEO Drew Houston, who started the cloud storage company when he was 24, plans to step down and assume the role of executive chairman.

headline: Goldman Sachs Maintains Neutral on Workday, Lowers Price Target to $151
summary: Goldman Sachs  analyst Kash Rangan   maintains Workday (NASDAQ:WDAY) with a Neutral and lowers the price target from $206 to $151.
